prompt: A wide hero banner for the open-source tool "rust-openrouter-mcp" — a single Rust binary connecting an AI assistant to the OpenRouter model marketplace. A central terminal/binary cube emits a network of glowing routes to a constellation of model nodes; each route yields a different output: an image, a video frame, an audio waveform, and a chat bubble. Dark slate tech background with orange/amber + teal accents, subtle grid, depth and bokeh, cinematic lighting, clean modern flat-3D style, generous negative space on the left for a title. No text, no logos.

variants.text: Here is a hero banner for "rust-openrouter-mcp" featuring a cinematic, modern design. The central glowing binary cube and radiating network of routes beautifully represent how the single Rust binary connects to the text, image, video, and audio outputs that make up the OpenRouter model marketplace.
Here is the wide hero banner for **rust-openrouter-mcp**, designed to highlight its ability to connect you to an expansive world of model capabilities through a single unified gateway.
